title: Joseph Liouville
body:
Joseph Liouville ( LEE-oo-VIL; French: [ʒozɛf ljuvil]; 24 March 1809 – 8 September 1882) was a French mathematician who worked on a number of different fields in mathematics, including number theory, complex analysis, and mathematical physics.
The crater Liouville on the Moon is named after him.
categories: Foreign members of the Royal Society
French fellows of the Royal Society
International members of the American Philosophical Society
Members of the French Academy of Sciences
Members of the Göttingen Academy of Sciences and Humanities
Members of the Royal Swedish Academy of Sciences
